description: Bifolio of accounts in Arabic and Greek/Coptic numerals. Very neat handwriting and striking arrangement on the page. Possibly of a landlord? The entries have headers such as makhzan; al-dār al-maʿrūa bi-Ibn Dāwūd; duwayra; duwayra; makhzan; duwayra; ḥānūt; ḥānūt. Merits further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
